prompt: Fun modern sticker-style emblem logo for a clay-pigeon ball-trap shooting club. A realistic black AR-15 rifle and a realistic over-and-under wooden clay-shooting shotgun crossed in an X behind a big glossy bright red 3D heart in the dead center. An orange clay pigeon disc shattering into fragments at the top. One single clean banner ribbon below the heart with the words 'LA DETENTE' written ONCE in big fun bold playful display lettering, cream and gold, perfectly spelled, no other text anywhere. Bold black outline sticker look, vibrant, warm lighting, centered, symmetrical, white background, crisp clean edges, ready for t-shirt print and embroidery, high detail, no watermark.
